title: rc.6 coverage gate + dogfood test
description: Add scripts/rc6-coverage-gate.mjs mirroring rc.5 coverage gate pattern. Gate checks: (a) knowledge-hint-broad.cjs present + registered SessionStart in 3 client configs; (b) knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs present + registered PreToolUse with Edit|Write|MultiEdit matchers in 3 configs; (c) session-hints cache file shape correct; (d) edit-counter sidecar created on hook invocation; (e) fabric-hint Signal A reads edit-counter (E5); (f) fabric-config.json schema has archive_edit_threshold; (g) lint #26 narrow_too_few registered; (h) hint-silence-counter sidecar created on silent path. After gate passes, run rc.6 dogfood: open test session, observe SessionStart inject + Edit triggering narrow inject + same-file second Edit silent + revision change re-inject. Tag v2.0.0-rc.6 on green gate + green dogfood.
implementation: Check (a) knowledge-hint-broad.cjs file exists; parse 3 config files; assert SessionStart references the hook
Check (b) knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs file exists; parse 3 config files; assert PreToolUse + matchers correct
Check (c) write a fake session-hints-X.json with expected shape; assert hook reads/writes correct shape
Check (d) simulate hook invocation; assert .fabric/.cache/edit-counter line appended
Check (e) read fabric-hint.cjs source; assert it references edit-counter and archive_edit_threshold
Check (f) import fabric-config schema; assert archive_edit_threshold field present with default 20
Check (g) import doctor inspectors; assert inspectNarrowTooFew exported
Check (h) simulate narrow-hint silent path; assert hint-silence-counter line appended

Run dogfood scenario: (1) fabric init in test repo (2) Open Claude Code session → expect SessionStart broad-injection in stderr (3) Edit a file matching a narrow entry → expect narrow titles in stderr (4) Edit same file again → expect silent (cache skip) (5) Approve a pending → revision_hash changes → next Edit on same file → expect re-emit (cache invalidated) (6) Verify .fabric/.cache/ contents (edit-counter, session-hints-X.json, hint-silence-counter when applicable)

reference.pattern: Coverage gate script mirroring rc.5 pattern

criteria: All 8 structural checks pass on rc.6 head commit
Dogfood test: open session, observe SessionStart inject + Edit triggering narrow inject + same-file silent + revision-change re-inject
rc.6 tag created on green gate + green dogfood

rationale.chosen_approach: Mirror rc.5 gate pattern; structural script + manual dogfood verification
alternatives_considered: Full automated e2e hook test suite
rationale.tradeoffs: Dogfood non-reproducible; structural gate covers contract correctness

manual_checks: Full dogfood scenario 1-6 completes as expected

risks.description: Hook event format varies across Claude Code / Cursor / Codex during dogfood
risks.mitigation: Test on Claude Code first; document per-client divergence in follow-up
risks.fallback: Tag rc.6 with note about limited cross-client validation
